# Source

For safety and performance I am saving the generated badges in this repo, but even
so, I want to keep the urls that generated them for future reference and possible
modifications

- LinkedIn "https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-0077B5?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bernardo-borges-5b36b817a/"

- NixOS "https://img.shields.io/badge/NixOs-fff?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg%2bxml;base64,"
